theorems.name: global_plus_delta_error_bound
theorems.note: G_4 error bound: approximation error of global+delta scheme ≤ global error + delta error (triangle inequality). Closed via SubspaceOverlap bridge. (2026-04-26)

theorems.name: subspace_project_complement_le_norm
theorems.note: orthogonal projection residual ‖x - P_U x‖² ≤ ‖x‖²; Pythagoras argument; statement clean; proof sorry (2026-04-25)

theorems.name: stableRank_implies_low_dim_approximation
theorems.note: Eckart-Young existence: stableRank W ≤ k ⇒ ∃ rank-k approx with bounded Frobenius error; needs SVD theory; sorry (2026-04-25)
